news.title: Factory job cuts in June neared financial crisis and Covid levels, S&P says
news.summary: The firm's manufacturing index ran better than expected for June. It came largely from an inventory rebuild and despite sharp job cuts. The firm's June manufacturing index came better thanexpected for June, it came mostly from a inventory rebuild.

news.title: Meta announces new smart glasses starting at $299, as Zuckerberg keeps pushing wearables
news.summary: Meta executives have said they see the lightweight smart glasses as a step towards a more advanced device that includes screens in the lenses. The glasses are expected to go on sale later this year.

news.title: SpaceX stock climbs 2% after falling below $150 debut price
news.summary: Gains have been pared back at the space and AI company following an initial surge after its record-breaking IPO. Gains have also been reduced at the company following a record-setting IPO.

news.title: U.S. issues sweeping Iran oil sanctions waivers, unlocking billions in revenue for Tehran
news.summary: The U.S. issued a sweeping rollback of sanctions on Iranian oil. The move offers Tehran an economic lifeline as negotiations toward a peace deal proceed.

news.title: Sen. Cassidy plans to push 'big idea' for Social Security reform in last days in office
news.summary: Sen. Bill Cassidy says he has come up with a plan to invest in the stock market on the program's behalf. Social Security faces an imminent funding shortfall.

news.title: These stocks are falling the most on Tuesday as the tech sector comes under pressure
news.summary: Most of the day’s biggest losers are still up tremendously for 2026. Most of the biggest losers from the day are up tremendously in 2026, however.

news.title: At school, it’s cheating. At work, it’s essential. New grads are caught in a double standard around AI.
news.summary: Mixed messages on AI are another challenge for Gen Z. Gen Z already faces a tough job market. It's unclear whether Gen Z will be able to take advantage of the new technology.

news.title: Why a 30-year mortgage loan could be your biggest money mistake
news.summary: You might be able to save hundreds of thousands of dollars with a 15-year mortgage loan. You might be can save Hundreds of Thousands of dollars by taking out a 15 year mortgage.

news.title: Micron and Sandisk lead a sharp tech selloff in a ‘gut-check’ moment for AI stocks
news.summary: Investors are taking a ‘breather’ from AI-driven momentum, an analyst says. ‘It’s a good time to take a breather,’ he says.

news.title: Big Tech has split into two artificial-intelligence camps — but the smart money isn’t chasing the next OpenAI
news.summary: Alphabet and Microsoft are the safer choice in the AI race, analysts say. The tech giants are more likely to be able to compete on a global scale, they say.
